A letter from the heart

Kuttyma from Sumant, with everything I have

🤍

A letter from the heart

Kuttyma from Sumant, with everything I have

Why I'm here

I was scared.
And that was wrong.

Kuttyma, I know those things mattered to you. Not just a little — deeply, completely, in a way that deserved honesty from day one. And instead of giving you that, I hid. Not because I didn't trust you. Not because I didn't love you. But because I was terrified of losing you.

I was so scared that if you knew the truth about my past, you'd walk away — and the thought of a life without you felt unbearable. So I made a selfish choice. I chose my fear over your right to know. And that wasn't fair to you.

I am so deeply sorry.

I love you, Kuttymaaa. More than my past, more than my fears.

· · ·

Us — every moment I'm fighting for

my favourite mirror selfie with you
that restaurant night I keep thinking about
backseat us — golden film moment
looking at each other like the whole world stopped
the hug that says everything
roses night — you were so happy
outdoor sunshine goofballs
all-black mirror match
flower in your hair day
· · ·

What I'm truly sorry for

I

I hid things from my past that you had every right to know. It wasn't my place to decide what you could handle — that was yours to decide, and I took that away from you.

II

I let my fear lead me instead of my love for you. Fear made me selfish. Fear made me hide. And you deserved someone brave enough to be honest — I failed that, and I own it completely.

III

I know how much this hurt you. I know you feel betrayed. I know the trust we built feels shaken — and that is entirely because of my choice to stay silent. I am not making excuses for that.

IV

None of those things from my past are who I am today, and none of them change how I feel about you — but you deserved to know them so you could make that decision yourself. I stole that from you. I'm so sorry.

V

I promise you — from this moment — no more walls between us. No more fear that makes me go quiet. Whatever it is, however hard, you will hear it from me first. Always.

· · ·

Our Connection

Measure My Love

Kuttymaaa, people say love is hard to measure. But let me try to show you how much I care about you...

✦ ✦ ✦

"I cannot live without you — and I mean that not as a plea, but as the truest thing I know. This is the last time you will ever be hurt by something I kept from you. I swear it."

— Sumant

Please

Forgive me,
Kuttyma.

I'm not asking you to forget. I'm not asking you to pretend it's okay. I'm just asking for the chance to spend every day from here showing you that you are the only thing that has ever mattered to me — more than my fear, more than my past, more than anything.

You are my person. And I will spend as long as it takes earning back every ounce of your trust.

I love you infinitely, Kuttymaaa. 🤍

I love you. Only you. Always you.

Made with every piece of my heart  ·  Sumant  ·  For Kuttyma
